files_changed.before_excerpt: capabilities --for accepted exact filters only and did not report requested/normalized filter metadata.
files_changed.after_excerpt: capabilities --for normalizes natural aliases and emits filter plus filterAliases metadata.

files_changed.before_excerpt: filter commands by supported command family or object kind
files_changed.after_excerpt: filter commands by supported command family or object kind; accepts natural plurals/group aliases such as slides, ranges, conditional-formats, and modules

files_changed.before_excerpt: Unknown capabilities flags could be ignored as filters were parsed opportunistically.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Unknown capabilities flags return invalid_args and teach exact --for retry syntax.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Global --json typos fell through normal parsing.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Common --json typos and capabilities --fr receive copy-pasteable corrections.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Help topic matching required canonical group names for xlsx conditional-formats and data-validations.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Help topic aliases normalize xlsx conditional-format, conditional-formatting, cf, data-validation, and dv to canonical group help.

files_changed.before_excerpt: No regression covered xlsx cf or xlsx dv help aliases.
files_changed.after_excerpt: help_alias_topics_resolve_to_canonical_group_help pins both alias families.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Discovery guide listed capabilities but not the accepted --for vocabulary.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Discovery guide lists --for examples, filters, and alias strings in JSON and text output.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Robot-docs test did not assert filter vocabulary or aliases.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Robot-docs test asserts conditional-format/module filters and aliases.

files_changed.before_excerpt: vba create advertised all flags together without a machine-readable mode split.
files_changed.after_excerpt: vba create capability includes flagConstraints for pure and legacy-office-com modes and advertises --dry-run for pure mode.

files_changed.before_excerpt: vba create help showed only a flat usage and flag list.
files_changed.after_excerpt: vba create help includes a Mode guide with pure Rust and legacy Office-COM commands and conflict warning.

files_changed.before_excerpt: conditional-formats add advertised flags but not valid --type-specific combinations.
files_changed.after_excerpt: conditional-formats add capability includes flagConstraints for expression, cell-is, color-scale, data-bar, and icon-set.

files_changed.before_excerpt: No capability metadata test pinned conditional-format add mode constraints.
files_changed.after_excerpt: xlsx_conditional_format_add_capability_advertises_rule_constraints pins required, repeat, and forbidden flags.

files_changed.before_excerpt: No single command returned quick refs, health, discovery aliases, and next actions together.
files_changed.after_excerpt: agent_triage emits a read-only JSON mega-command with dataHash and compact doctor health.

files_changed.before_excerpt: No top-level dispatch for agent-triage existed.
files_changed.after_excerpt: dispatch_value routes agent-triage to the new read-only triage payload.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Capabilities did not advertise a one-call triage surface.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Capabilities advertise ooxml agent-triage as a read-only agent mega-command.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Capability aliases were embedded in capabilities.rs and duplicated in help/robot docs.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Shared alias constants and helpers serve capabilities, robot docs, help, and triage.

files_changed.before_excerpt: capabilities.rs owned alias normalization and suggestion helpers.
files_changed.after_excerpt: capabilities.rs imports shared alias helpers and object kinds.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Robot docs carried a handwritten filter and alias list.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Robot docs derive filters and aliases from the shared registry.

files_changed.before_excerpt: Worksheet alias slices were local to help.
files_changed.after_excerpt: Help uses shared conditional-format and data-validation alias constants.

files_changed.before_excerpt: data-validations create listed flags without type-specific requirements and conflicts.
files_changed.after_excerpt: data-validations create includes flagConstraints for list, whole, decimal, date, time, textLength, and custom modes.

files_changed.before_excerpt: xlsx charts create did not publish range-vs-table source constraints.
files_changed.after_excerpt: xlsx charts create publishes type modes, range/table sourceModes, and output safety requirements.

files_changed.before_excerpt: pptx charts create did not publish inline-vs-external source constraints.
files_changed.after_excerpt: pptx charts create publishes type modes and inline-json/inline-file/external-xlsx sourceModes.

files_changed.before_excerpt: doctor health compact JSON construction was private to the command handler.
files_changed.after_excerpt: doctor_health_snapshot exposes the compact advisory JSON for agent-triage and keeps command exit behavior unchanged.

files_changed.before_excerpt: doctor health smoke assumed dotnet was installed and required exit 0.
files_changed.after_excerpt: doctor health smoke accepts advisory exit 0 or 1 and asserts JSON exitCode/healthy consistency.
